sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_col(
					$wpdb->prepare(
						'SELECT ID FROM ' . $wpdb->posts . ' WHERE ID < %d AND post_type = %s AND (post_mime_type LIKE %s OR post_mime_type LIKE %s) ORDER BY ID DESC',
						$resume_position,
						'attachment',
						'%image%',
						'%pdf%'
					)
				)

$wpdb->get_col(
					$wpdb->prepare(
						'SELECT ID FROM ' . $wpdb->posts . ' WHERE ID < %d AND post_type = %s AND post_mime_type LIKE %s ORDER BY ID DESC',
						$resume_position,
						'attachment',
						'%image%'
					)
				)

$wpdb->get_col(
						$wpdb->prepare(
							"SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE ID < %d AND post_type = 'attachment' AND (post_mime_type LIKE %s OR post_mime_type LIKE %s) ORDER BY ID DESC",
							$resume_position,
							'%image%',
							'%pdf%'
						)
					)

$wpdb->get_col(
						$wpdb->prepare(
							"SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE ID < %d AND post_type = 'attachment' AND post_mime_type LIKE %s ORDER BY ID DESC",
							$resume_position,
							'%image%'
						)
					)
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_type = 'attachment' AND post_mime_type LIKE '%%image%%' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1" )
